name: Sweet Corn Bread#2
recipeIngredient: 1 package 16-ounce frozen corn kernels, thawed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. Beat butter and shortening in a large bowl until fluffy.
4. Beat in egg. Gradually beat in masa harina, then water. Stir in remaining ingredients.
5. Transfer batter to prepared pan. Cover with foil.
6. Bake until firm to the touch, about 50 minutes.
7. Let stand for 15 minutes. Cut into squares and serve warm.
